corrections.note: Printed form has acute on ή, not circumflex on ῆ.
Manuscript siglum is ℵ*, not delta-star.
Extraneous duplicated parenthetical reading not present in print.
Printed text reads abbreviation ὑποχειρ. followed by ℵ* correction note; transcript has garbled letters and lost abbreviation point.

uncertain.note: After ἀνερεθήτω Β* ℵ, the parenthetical correction in the scan looks like ἀναμ. Bab ℵc.b(?) as transcribed, but the exact letters are slightly cramped.
Final parenthetical after ἐκλιψετε ℵ(?) is cut off at page edge; cannot verify beyond visible ἐκλειψ.

notes: Page contains apparatus only; no body text on this scan. Running head ΙΕΡΕΜΙΑΣ [APP. matches. Main issues are one siglum misread, one duplicated phrase, one garbled abbreviation, and one accent difference clearly visible.
